profile.name: Gul Ahmad Faizi
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer
profile.summary: Full-Stack Developer with 6 years of experience building scalable web applications using React.js, Node.js/Express, SQL Server, MySQL, HTML, CSS/Bootstrap. Experienced in developing enterprise-grade solutions, including the Vision Rewards platform and Case Management Systems, improving operational efficiency, data integrity, and user engagement. Skilled in delivering client-focused solutions and collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive impactful results.

experience.summary: Served as full-stack developer on the Vision Rewards USA project.

details.description: Served as full-stack developer on the Vision Rewards USA project, utilizing React.js, Node.js, and SQL Server to build a robust rewards management platform.
Designed and maintained features for tracking customer rewards, payments, and transactions, enabling clients to monitor activity in real-time.
The system improved customer engagement and streamlined rewards operations, saving time and enhancing transparency for clients.

experience.summary: Developed a Business & Task Management Information System (BTMIS).

details.description: Developed a Business & Task Management Information System (BTMIS) to manage financial, HR, and administrative operations.
Built scalable, user-friendly applications using React.js, Node.js/Express, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap, improving workflow speed and transparency.
Streamlined company processes, reducing manual tracking errors and enhancing operational efficiency.

experience.company: MRRD â€“ Regional Programs Coordination Office (RPCO)
experience.summary: Developed a centralized project management and monitoring system for nationwide rural infrastructure projects.

details.description: Developed a centralized project management and monitoring system for nationwide rural infrastructure projects, saving 100+ staff hours per month.
Built web applications using React.js, Node.js/Express, SQL Server, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap, improving cross-department coordination.
Delivered dashboards and analytics tools that enhanced leadership decision-making and program efficiency.

experience.summary: Developed Case Management Systems (CMS) for criminal and civil courts.

details.description: Developed Case Management Systems (CMS) for criminal and civil courts, supporting 1,000+ judiciary users and positively impacting thousands of case participants.
Built scalable applications using React.js, Node.js/Express, SQL Server, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap, improving case resolution efficiency and data integrity.
Collaborated with legal professionals and international advisors to translate judicial processes into user-focused solutions.
